extraction.one_line_summary: POGACAR won the sprint from the GC group in Laruns after catching Hershey's long breakaway inside 1km, with ROGLIC taking yellow jersey.
tactical_patterns: Martinez attacked mid-climb for stage hunting after losing GC hopes to crashes, revealing EF's pivot from GC to stages.
Jumbo-Visma controlled final climb despite Roglic being in yellow contention, allowing GC group to catch breakaway at 1km.
Hershey survived all-day breakaway through both Cat-1 climbs but GC group's time-chasing negated cooperation before sprint finish.
Pogacar sprinted from GC group for stage win rather than conceding to breakaway, prioritizing 10-second bonus over energy conservation.

rider_signals.MARTINEZ Daniel: neutral: attacked mid-climb for stage win after abandoning GC ambitions following 3+ minute crash losses in week one
rider_signals.PINOT Thibaut: negative: dropped early on climb again with continued back issues, riding better than previous day but clearly not recovered
rider_signals.HERSHEY Marc: positive: led breakaway over both Cat-1 climbs solo and still contested sprint at finish despite day-long effort
rider_signals.ROGLIC Primoz: positive: took yellow jersey with 21-second advantage after being 3 seconds down, Jumbo controlled final climb
rider_signals.YATES Adam: negative: lost yellow jersey and dropped to 1:02 down after struggling in final kilometers of last climb
rider_signals.POGACAR Tadej: positive: won stage sprint from GC group and moved to 7th overall at 44 seconds, clawing back crosswind losses
